For a new character, how many pulls should I save? I am new to the game, and want to go all in on one of the banner characters, but not sure what breakpoints to go for. (I don’t really have my mind set on anyone? Most likely was going to wait until the next banner characters to see)
Generally, 42 pulls is needed to pull a single copy of a character (90 is hard pity)
For each character,  you usually want to pull 1~8 copies depending on how much you can afford
In most cases, 4 copies of a character is considered complete
So you should ready roughly 200 pulls for a banner you want
Would I need the weapon as well? Or is that more character dependent ?
depends on character <:A_pinch:1432980538536493057>
In most cases character > weapon
Some specific case(hand size wheels), the wheel is also must pull
But so far only anniversary units have hand size wheels
To clarify, 42 pulls is the AVERAGE pulls needed. Ymmv
Regarding what character to pull, I reccomend waiting for the next rerun banner announcement before asking again <@266065777633787905>
Ok another question but any covenants do pickman? Also what’s a good alternative WOD for him since I don’t have his sig <:Pity:1400771620989308998>

If you don't have that, rewinding time wheel
Rewinding is really good on him
If you're a whale, rewinding time has 100% hit rate via turn rewind <:jangbruh:880704320050438184>
